description: Label-safety and GBM treatment-scenario evidence taxonomy. Stage 4 emits EVIDENCE ROWS ONLY. It never emits a green/amber/red traffic light, a composite tolerability score, or a prescribing recommendation.

prohibited_outputs.statement: The following must never appear in any Stage-4 artifact. A test scans every emitted artifact for these keys and fails the build if one appears.
prohibited_outputs.reason: Spot is decision-support, not a prescriber, a PK/tox oracle or a substitute for clinical/regulatory/safety expertise. A single combined clinical score would hide exactly the provenance this stage exists to preserve.
prohibited_outputs.supersedes: This replaces the 'safety / synergy sub-panel (traffic light)' sketch in the original 04_PKPD/README.md.

definitions.label_supported: Stated in a specific, cited section of a current regulatory label (SPL/openFDA/EMA), bound to setid/application + label version + effective date + raw response hash.
definitions.literature_supported: Stated in a cited public publication, bound to a source record.
definitions.signal_only: A disproportionality/spontaneous-report signal (e.g. FAERS). Hypothesis-generating ONLY.
definitions.no_evidence_found: The named sources WERE searched and returned nothing for this item.
definitions.not_evaluated: The item was not searched in any source.

hard_rules: no_evidence_found MUST NOT render as 'safe', 'no risk', 'negative' or a green state. It is a statement about the SEARCH, not about the drug. Every emitted row carries renders_as_safe=false and an explicit display_text saying so.
not_evaluated MUST NOT render as no_evidence_found.
signal_only can never establish incidence, causality, safety or a contraindication.

if_ever_accepted.required_disclaimer: Spontaneous-report disproportionality. Reporting rates are not incidence; no denominator; subject to reporting, indication and notoriety bias.

faers_policy.note: No FAERS adapter is implemented in this pass. The evidence state exists so that a future adapter cannot enter through any other door.

label_sections.note: LOINC codes were read from live DailyMed SPL responses (see sources.json: dailymed_spl_structure_probe), not from model memory. Only the codes and element paths were taken; no drug content from the probes is used as evidence.

gbm_scenarios.description: Named GBM treatment scenarios. Each is a SEPARATE evidence lane. They are never merged into one 'GBM safety' verdict.

interaction_types.description: Kept separate; never collapsed into one interaction flag.

values.label: Mechanistic antagonism (e.g. an agent that would blunt the intended pharmacology)

hard_rules: Never summarize a label from memory. Every label_supported row must quote/cite an exact labeled section of an exact label version, bound to a raw response hash.
One evidence row per finding. No aggregation across findings, scenarios or interaction types.
Stage 4 does not decide whether a scenario is acceptable. It reports what the sources say and what was not evaluated.
